zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Of Bohemia duchess of wroclaw於1296年2月21日出生在捷克普拉哈時，她的父親Václav II. König von Böhmen, Václav I. als König von Polen24歲，母親Guta Juditha Gräfin von Habsburg24歲。她和Boleslaw "the Wasteful" Piast III至少有3個兒子。她去世於1322年4月8日在波蘭多爾諾希利a斯吉萊格尼尼次吉享年26歲，埋葬在捷克普拉哈茲布拉斯拉福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Of Bohemia duchess of wroclaw于1296年2月21日出生在捷克普拉哈时，她的父亲Václav II. König von Böhmen, Václav I. als König von Polen24岁，母亲Guta Juditha Gräfin von Habsburg24岁。她和Boleslaw "the Wasteful" Piast III至少有3个儿子。她去世于1322年4月8日在波兰多爾諾希利a斯吉萊格尼尼次吉享年26岁，埋葬在捷克普拉哈茲布拉斯拉福。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Of Bohemia duchess of wroclaw was born on 21 February 1296, in Prague, Czechia, her father, Václav II. König von Böhmen, Václav I. als König von Polen, was 24 and her mother, Guta Juditha Gräfin von Habsburg, was 24. She had at least 3 sons with Boleslaw "the Wasteful" Piast III. She died on 8 April 1322, in Legnica, Lower Silesia, Poland, at the age of 26, and was buried in Zbraslav, Prague, Czechia.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Of Bohemia duchess of wroclaw est née le 21 février 1296, à Prague, République tchèque, son père, Václav II. König von Böhmen, Václav I. als König von Polen, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Guta Juditha Gräfin von Habsburg, avait 24 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils avec Boleslaw "the Wasteful" Piast III. Elle est décédée le 8 avril 1322, à Legnicki, dolnośląskie, Pologne, à l’âge de 26 ans, et a été enterrée à Zbraslav, Prague, République tchèque.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Of Bohemia duchess of wroclaw am 21. Februar 1296 in Prag, Tschechien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Václav II. König von Böhmen, Václav I. als König von Polen 24 und ihre Mutter Guta Juditha Gräfin von Habsburg 24. Sie hatte mit Boleslaw "the Wasteful" Piast III mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb am 8. April 1322 im Alter von 26 Jahren in Legnicki, Niederschlesien, Polen und wurde in Königsaal, Prag, Tschechien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Of Bohemia duchess of wroclaw è nata il il 21 febbraio 1296 nel Praga, Cechia, sua padre, Václav II. König von Böhmen, Václav I. als König von Polen, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Guta Juditha Gräfin von Habsburg, aveva 24 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli con Boleslaw "the Wasteful" Piast III. Morì il 8 aprile 1322, nel Legnicki, dolnośląskie, Polonia, all'età di 26 anni, e fu sepolta a Zbraslav, Praga, Cechia.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Of Bohemia duchess of wroclawが1296年2月21日にチェコプラハで生まれた時，父Václav II. König von Böhmen, Václav I. als König von Polenは24歳，母Guta Juditha Gräfin von Habsburgは24歳であった。彼女はBoleslaw "the Wasteful" Piast IIIとの間に少なくとも3人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1322年4月8日にポーランドドルノsルaスキレグニクイで26歳で死去し，チェコプラハズブラスラフにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Of Bohemia duchess of wroclaw(이)가 1296년 2월 21일 체코 프라하에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Václav II. König von Böhmen, Václav I. als König von Polen(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Guta Juditha Gräfin von Habsburg(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 Boleslaw "the Wasteful" Piast III(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1322년 4월 8일 폴란드 도노sa스키 레그닉키에서 26세의 나이로 사망했으며 체코 프라하 즈브라슬라브에 묻혔다.

mn.21 February 1296–8 April 1322: 1296 оны Хоёрдугаар сарын 21–1322 оны Дөрөвдүгээр сарын 8

pt.21 February 1296–8 April 1322: 21 de fevereiro de 1296–8 de abril de 1322
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Of Bohemia duchess of wroclaw nasceu em 21 de fevereiro de 1296, em Praha, Chequia, seu pai, Václav II. König von Böhmen, Václav I. als König von Polen, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Guta Juditha Gräfin von Habsburg, tinha 24 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos com Boleslaw "the Wasteful" Piast III. Ela faleceu em 8 de abril de 1322, em Legnicki, dolnośląskie, Polônia, com 26 anos, e foi sepultada em Zbraslav, Praha, Chequia.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Of Bohemia duchess of wroclaw родилась 21 февраля 1296 г. в местности Прага, Чехия, её отцу по имени Václav II. König von Böhmen, Václav I. als König von Polen было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Guta Juditha Gräfin von Habsburg, 24. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына от Boleslaw "the Wasteful" Piast III. Она умерла 8 апреля 1322 г. в местности легникки, долноsлaски, Польша в возрасте 26 лет и была похоронена в местности збраслав, Прага, Чехия.

es.21 February 1296–8 April 1322: 21 de febrero de 1296–8 de abril de 1322
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Of Bohemia duchess of wroclaw nació el 21 de febrero de 1296, en Praga, Chequia, su papá, Václav II. König von Böhmen, Václav I. als König von Polen, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Guta Juditha Gräfin von Habsburg, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos con Boleslaw "the Wasteful" Piast III. Murió el 8 de abril de 1322, en Legnicki, dolnośląskie, Polonia, a la edad de 26 años, y fue sepultada en Zbraslav, Praga, Chequia.
